# Prashanth Kumar Kadasi

> Data Analyst & AI Developer specializing in LLMs, Python, Astro, and building AI tools for everyday life.

I build intelligent applications and use AI to improve everyday life. From fine-tuning 20B AI models to creating birthday apps for my kid, I believe AI should directly serve people.

## Contact & Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/kprsnt2
- HuggingFace: https://huggingface.co/kprsnt
- Website: https://kprsnt.in
- Email: kprsnt@gmail.com
- X (Twitter): https://x.com/prashanth_29

## Technical Expertise
- **Programming Languages**: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, Rust, SQL, Go
- **Web Development**: React, Next.js, Astro, Node.js, Flask, Tailwind CSS, Actix, Laravel, PHP
- **AI & Machine Learning**: LLM Fine-tuning (QLoRA, Unsloth), HuggingFace Transformers, RAG Pipelines, Prompt Engineering, Agentic AI, Google Gemini API, Anthropic Claude API, OpenAI API
- **Data & Databases**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, DuckDB, Pandas, Numpy, data visualization
- **Cloud & DevOps**: Docker, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Vercel, Cloudflare Pages, Linux Administration

## Highlighted Projects
### MyLocalCLI
A privacy-focused cross-platform CLI AI agent alternative to Claude Code supporting 6 LLM providers, 26 tools, and custom execution environments.

### BrandScore AI
An AI-powered brand analysis platform where multiple models (Claude, Gemini, GPT) evaluate brand metrics.

### Drug Discovery Fine-Tuning
Fine-tuned LLMs (including 20B parameter models) specifically to predict novel molecular SMILES and assist in target research. Trained efficiently on AMD MI300X and NVIDIA consumer GPUs.

### Personal "AI For Life" Projects
- **Birthday Countdown App**: An app made for my kid combining countdowns with AI-generated storytelling.
- **NEET Prep Assistant**: An interactive study tool built specifically for my niece's exam prep.
- **Valentine's Experience**: A personalized romantic web app surprise.

## Experience
**Data Analyst @ Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)**
*Oct 2012 - Present*
- Analyzed complex datasets to drive business insights.
- Developed automated reporting workflows.
- Mentored junior analysts in data visualization and SQL optimization.
